prompt: A clean English learning infographic poster titled "20 Common Vegetables", using a neat grid layout (4x5) where each card displays one vegetable. Each card includes: a realistic photo of the vegetable, the English name (bold), British or American phonetic notation (IPA), and a brief English description. Overall style: minimalist design, white background, soft green and light color palette, card-based UI with rounded corners, tidy typography, and visual balance. Suitable for English beginners, similar to a classroom teaching poster. Ideal for social media sharing, high resolution, 4K, infographic style. Size: 1080x1350.
